title: Berni Alder
body: Berni Julian Alder (September 9, 1925 – September 7, 2020) was a German-born American physicist specialized in statistical mechanics, and a pioneer of computational modelling of matter.
categories: Emigrants from Nazi Germany to the United States
Fellows of the American Academy of Arts and Sciences
Fellows of the American Physical Society
Jewish emigrants from Nazi Germany to the United States
